checks.description: Ready signal must not be asserted before the multiplier has observed at least one clock cycle after inputs are stable.
notes: Prevents premature rdy without any processing.
checks.pass_condition: rdy can only transition high after at least one rising edge of clk following input stabilization.
checks.trigger_condition: When inputs a and b become stable after reset.

checks.description: When the ready signal rdy transitions to 1, the product output p must equal the unsigned multiplication of the last applied inputs a and b.
notes: Uses the concrete input values driven by the plan; no exact-cycle latency is assumed.
checks.pass_condition: p == a * b at the cycle where rdy == 1.
checks.trigger_condition: When rdy rises from 0 to 1 after a legal operation.

checks.description: For boundary input patterns (all zeros, all ones, min/max values), the ready signal must eventually assert and p must reflect the correct unsigned product.
notes: Covers width-sensitive edge cases without assuming fixed latency.
checks.pass_condition: When rdy becomes 1, p equals a*b for each boundary stimulus.
checks.trigger_condition: After applying each edge stimulus pattern.

checks.description: Repeated operations must produce distinct ready assertions; rdy should deassert between consecutive multiplications.
notes: Ensures back-to-back operations are observable as separate completions.
checks.pass_condition: rdy transitions high then low before the next operation's rdy can go high.
checks.trigger_condition: When two legal operations are issued back-to-back.
